evals.prompt: /grill-me about how to structure the authentication module
expectations: Asks questions one at a time — does not dump multiple questions at once
Provides a recommended answer for each question
Walks down each branch of the design tree before moving to the next
Does not start implementing until shared understanding is reached
Explores the codebase to answer questions that can be answered from code
Does not ask questions that can be resolved by reading existing files
Surfaces contradictions between stated plan and existing code
